basic_details.job_title: HAL Zonal Doctors Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) has officially announced the Zonal Doctors Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official website hal-india.co.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 65 years and possess an MBBS degree with 2 years post-qualification experience or an MBBS degree with a Postgraduate qualification are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications through offline mode until 23 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with 2 yrs post qualification experience OR MBBS + Postgraduate degree without any experience.
qualification.details: Zonal Doctor (MBBS with 2 yrs post qualification experience): MBBS with 2 years of post-qualification experience. Zonal Doctor (MBBS + Postgraduate degree without any experience): MBBS + Postgraduate degree without any experience and willingness to do general practice. | Qualification should be recognized by the Medical Council of India with a valid MCI Registration. The doctor should be running their private well-established and equipped clinic in the respective zone/area.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 5400/- Per month (MBBS with 2 yrs post qualification experience) / Rs. 9300/- Per month (MBBS + Postgraduate degree without any experience)

selection_process: Application submission Clinic visit by HAL Committee Shortlisting based on Committee Recommendation Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Zonal Doctors Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.hal-india.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download HAL Zonal Doctors Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HAL Zonal Doctors recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the HAL Zonal Doctors recruitment is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Zonal Doctor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an MBBS degree with 2 years of post-qualification experience, or an MBBS degree with a postgraduate degree without any prior experience. A valid MCI registration is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Zonal Doctors is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Zonal Doctors?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Zonal Doctors in Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the HAL Zonal Doctors recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or by hand.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Zonal Doctor positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 5400/- per month for MBBS with 2 years of experience, and Rs. 9300/- per month for MBBS with a postgraduate degree without experience.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the HAL Nashik office located?
faq.answer: The HAL Nashik office is located at Aircraft Division, Ojhar Township Post Office, Tal. Niphad, Nashik-422 207, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested photocopies of certificates and documents, including proof of age, qualification, experience, and training.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Zonal Doctors at HAL?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application submission, a clinic visit by the HAL Committee, shortlisting based on the committee's recommendation, and a personal interview.
